data.body: [operator-attested] LANDED ON MAIN via Gerrit. Change #807 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/807) status=MERGED; merge SHA ce1989cb181ad1ab0cf73c07a33ff25418af77ae. Both gates green: LLM-Review +1 (rebar review bot) AND Verified +1 (rebar CI bot). Commit b9035b4->rebased onto current origin/main (patchset 2, base includes 716f/5ff60da4f module-size hard-800 change); rebar-ticket: 3a27 trailer + DCO sign-off + Change-Id Id2d1a5adc66f5194f6e4eb651cc1ec4044c166e0. First patchset got Verified -1 (real CI failure: test_built_in_prompt_round_trips_canonically[plan-review-decomp-shape] — packaged prompt not in canonical form); fixed by canonicalizing the rubric front-matter via write_front_matter, re-verified locally (test_prompt_front_matter 89 passed), amended, re-pushed. Bounded sanity result (docs/experiments/plan-review-gate/runs/decomp_shape_sanity.json, 4 live single-criterion container runs): recall 1.0 over both positives (F1 layer-cake, F2 consumed-artifact-without-ordering-edge), false-accept 0.0 over both negatives (N1 vertical-slices, N2 ordered producer/consumer), stability 1.0. All ACs met.
